The '''barber birds''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of birdlike creature that was native to the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]]. The blue-and-white [[Color/Legends|colored]] birds were roughly two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and had an affinity for [[ganga root]], which they would retrieve from the ground.

{{Creature-stub}}
